item.title: week01
item.description: We’ll get started at 16:05 week01 COMP6443 H16A Good faith policy We expect a high standard of professionalism from you at all times while you are taking any of our courses. We expect all students to act in good faith at all times TLDR: Don’t be a jerk sec.edu.au/good-faith-policy > whoami Lachlan CompSci (Security) / Maths 4th year 👴 kinda cringe how to contact me lachlan.waugh@student.unsw.edu.au @melon on the SecEdu Slack @lachaln on the SecSoc Discord places for course discussion seceduau.

item.title: Week02
item.description: We’ll get started at 16:05 Week02 COMP6443 H16A Good faith policy We expect a high standard of professionalism from you at all times while you are taking any of our courses. We expect all students to act in good faith at all times TLDR: Don’t be a jerk sec.edu.au/good-faith-policy Admin stuff Presentations Bonus marks! Talk about something cool (security related), you’ve seen in the last week Around 10 minutes Challenges How are you finding this week’s challenges?

item.title: Week03
item.description: We’ll get started at 16:05 Week03 COMP6443 H16A Good faith policy We expect a high standard of professionalism from you at all times while you are taking any of our courses. We expect all students to act in good faith at all times TLDR: Don’t be a jerk sec.edu.au/good-faith-policy Challenges From now on, all challenges are worth marks. From next week, the challenges are more difficult! For full marks, you’ll probably have to do all the challenges (there’s some nerds lol) Solutions?

item.title: Week04
item.description: We’ll get started at 16:05 Week04 COMP6443 H16A Good faith policy We expect a high standard of professionalism from you at all times while you are taking any of our courses. We expect all students to act in good faith at all times TLDR: Don’t be a jerk sec.edu.au/good-faith-policy Presentations anybody? ten minute presentation on something cool security related from the last week? for bonus marks?? SOLUTIONS? anybody want to present the solutions for blog / files?

item.title: Week05
item.description: We’ll get started at 16:05 Week05 COMP6443 H16A Good faith policy We expect a high standard of professionalism from you at all times while you are taking any of our courses. We expect all students to act in good faith at all times TLDR: Don’t be a jerk sec.edu.au/good-faith-policy House cleaning Due Dates Report and topic3 challenges are now due Week07 Wednesday Report groups If you aren’t in a group please let me know
